creator: gmc@metro.cx
text:
(In reply to Tijl Coosemans from comment #4)

Ok, tried without files/patch-config.h and with that file removed, things are back to normal again. Just to be sure (openvpn package had an update in the time between my original report) I moved files/patch-config.h back again, recompiled and with that the problem is still there.
